ham.subject: Ticket #98765 Resolved: Feature Merge Completed
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that JIRA ticket #98765, which was tracking the merge of the new authentication module into the main branch, has been successfully resolved and merged.

Key points:
- The merge was completed on 2026-04-12 at 14:32 UTC.
- Automated tests passed with 100% coverage.
- The deployment to staging is scheduled for 2026-04-13 09:00 UTC.

Please review the changes in the repository at <URL> and update your local branches accordingly.

Thanks for your collaboration on this! If you encounter any issues during deployment, let me know.

Best,
Alex Johnson
Software Engineer
Acme Corp
alex.johnson@acme.com

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Helpdesk Ticket #12345 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We have detected a critical issue with your workstation that requires immediate attention. Our monitoring tools have flagged an unauthorized process running under your account, which could compromise sensitive data.

To resolve this, please follow the steps below:

1. Open the IT Helpdesk portal at <URL>.
2. Log in with your corporate credentials.
3. Navigate to the "Ticket #12345" section.
4. Click "Update Ticket" and add the following details:
   - Issue: Unauthorized process detected
   - Severity: High
   - Workstation ID: WS-00123
5. Attach any relevant screenshots and click "Submit".

Failure to comply within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of system access. We appreciate your prompt cooperation.

Thank you,

IT Support Team
Acme Corp
support@acme.com
